description: Contact List/Create Page Tests + E2E. (1) Contact list page has ZERO page tests (T-02). (2) Contact create page has ZERO page tests — auth guard gap F-07 would be caught (T-03). (3) Bulk selection (select all, bulk email, bulk export) untested (T-05). (4) Contract tests missing for bulkEmail, bulkExport, bulkDelete (T-09). (5) No E2E Playwright tests for contact CRUD flow (T-10). Audit: docs/audit/contact-detail-wiring-audit.md §19.

audit_findings_resolved.actual: T-02 (new list test), T-03 (create wizard tests), T-05 (bulk handlers at page level); T-09 verified already-covered (audit §19 stale); T-10 (new E2E)

test_coverage.actual: ContactsPageClient: 29 tests; create page: 14 tests; E2E: 24 (8x3 browsers). Test-only diff → diff-coverage-test-only.

validations.name: Tests
validations.command: pnpm --filter @intelliflow/web test (605 files, 10718) && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/api test (229 files, 6182)

notes: Test-only task. Audit §19 reconciled (stale, same pattern as IFC-265): T-03 auth guard already fixed/tested + T-09 bulk contract tests already covered in contact.router.additional.test.ts (+security/tenant/coverage). Scoped to genuine gaps: new ContactsPageClient test (T-02/T-05) and new E2E (T-10); strengthened create-wizard test (T-03). No production code changed. bulkEmail email:null router test dropped — Contact.email is non-nullable String (impossible state).
